headline: PPL Stock Trading at a Premium to Industry at 17.74X: Should You Buy?
summary: PPL's data center-driven demand and $23 billion investment plan support growth, but premium valuation and lower returns warrant patience.

headline: Aligned Climate Capital and Planted Solar Advance Innovative Community Solar Project
summary: NEW YORK, July 14, 2026--Aligned Climate Capital acquires Armoracia, a 7.3 MW community solar project in Illinois deploying Planted's high-density power deployment platform.

raw.headline: Aligned Climate Capital and Planted Solar Advance Innovative Community Solar Project
raw.summary: NEW YORK, July 14, 2026--Aligned Climate Capital acquires Armoracia, a 7.3 MW community solar project in Illinois deploying Planted's high-density power deployment platform.
